description: Android PWA install support + persistent auto-save
changes: 📲 Install as Android App — step-by-step guide added
📲 'Install' button appears in header when app is installable
📲 Install shortcut added inside Backup modal
💾 navigator.storage.persist() called automatically on every load
💾 Storage permission now saved to IndexedDB for true persistence
✅ Install guide shows real-time persistent storage status
